title: Counseling and Mental Health: Mental Health
description: Conroe ISD's approach to student mental health outlines how the district identifies, supports, and connects students who may be experiencing emotional or behavioral challenges. The policy establishes guidelines for mental health programs, staff responsibilities, and when students should be referred to outside professionals or services. Families can use this information to better understand the support systems available to their children and how the district works to promote overall student well-being.
